---
name: Skill proposal or change
about: Propose a new skill or a behavioral change to an existing one
labels: enhancement
---

**The failure you observed** (what an agent did wrong without this guidance;
a transcript excerpt or eval scenario beats a description)

**Proposed guidance** (or a sketch)

**How it would be tested** (baseline scenario, oracle, or micro-test; see
CONTRIBUTING.md: behavioral guidance needs a failing test first)
